info.name: JaspertReport — Multi-Tenant Engine
info.description:
Postman collection for testing the JaspertReport multi-tenant report engine.

Prerequisites:
  1. Start the app: ./mvnw spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=test
  2. Use token 'tok-A' for tenant 'acme' or 'tok-B' for tenant 'corp'
  3. Reports generate PDF by default; change 'format' to XLSX, DOCX, or HTML

Tenants configured in application-test.properties:
  - acme: token=tok-A, reports=ventas,stock,test_report
  - corp: token=tok-B, reports=reporte1

item.name: Error: Disallowed Report → 403 (tok-A has no access to 'nomina')
